v3w.publish_crop_notes: Bottom 232 pixels (rows 1064-1295) include neighbouring windows. Crop them before publishing any v3w-derived image (max/sum/derot/JPEG renders) to anywhere internet-reachable. The crop is symbolic; an attacker could still recover the windows from raw frames, but the published derivatives should not. Established from peter@pip 2026-06-10.
